message:
feat(connector-reliability): add circuit-breaker, DLQ, and replay controls

Implements connector-specific reliability controls for handling external
system outages. Layers on top of generic circuit_breaker and retry modules
with connector-aware error classification, bounded dead-letter queue with
TTL/retry-limit eviction, replay planning, and per-connector telemetry.

Key types: ConnectorReliabilityController, DeadLetterQueue,
ConnectorErrorKind, ReplayPlan, ReliabilityRegistry

31 tests covering error classification, DLQ bounds/discard/purge/replay,
circuit breaker integration, shedding thresholds, and serde roundtrips.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
